footer.aboutText: BNBG Immobiliare S.r.l. is a premium real estate platform specializing in exceptional properties for discerning clients worldwide.

home.architecturalDesc: Filter listings instantly by your preferred building style and form.
home.curatedDesc: Meticulously selected signature listings representing high-end design craftsmanship.
home.latestDesc: Fresh properties introduced onto the prime markets this week.

search.descSale: Explore a portfolio of high-net-worth real estate ready for your acquisition.
search.descRent: Discover meticulously curated estates for lease in prime districts.

about.title: Elevating Real Estate Transactions Into Art Forms
about.desc: We understand that searching for real estate is about securing a long-term canvas for life. We align luxury materials, location data, and direct agent support to protect your interests.
about.vettedDesc: Every listing is cross-referenced for layout accuracy, structural standards, and clean deeds.
about.districtDesc: Direct access to private sales, off-market opportunities, and school reports.

cta.title: Looking to list your luxury estate?
cta.desc: Connect directly with our luxury brokers to showcase your property under premium catalogs.

aboutPage.subtitle: Our Story
aboutPage.title: When dreams become home
aboutPage.desc1: BNBG Immobiliare S.r.l was born in Bergamo, a city rich in history and beauty, in the beating heart of the center! A reality that combines enthusiasm and competence with the aim of accompanying those looking for or selling a home on a serene, clear and personalized path.
aboutPage.desc2: We believe that real estate is not just made of numbers and contracts, but above all of people, stories and life projects. For this reason we have chosen to build an agency that does not limit itself to intermediation, but that listens, advises and enhances every property with care, attention and modern tools.
aboutPage.desc3: Our structure offers mortgage, technical, legal, building/cadastral and notary consultancy services, supporting you in the management of any negotiation. BNBG Immobiliare was created to meet the needs of high-level investments; we are able to offer the management of entire income-producing real estate assets.
aboutPage.teamDesc: We provide decades of local expertise across primary metropolitan hubs.
